title: Bloodbound: Vampire Hunters
description:
Bloodbound is a fast-paced, Vampire multiplayer shooter that pits you and your friends against another team of players in an all-out battle to the death. Players must choose a side and fight till the bloody end, battling it out in a variety of locales. With a wide list of fearless characters, players can decide between the quick-witted and talented Slayers or the demons of the night themselves, the Vampires.

As a Vampire, use Blood Vision to track Slayers, invisibility to hunt or escape, and jump or leap at great distances. Slayers can use telekinetic powers to push vampires away when crowded, cite a prayer to protect you from evil, and much more. Learn to master every character, each of which comes with its own unique weapons and abilities

Players will be able to duke it out on several maps which vary in size and style, from an evacuated, bloody subway station to a cold, terrifying cemetery. Smash through shop fronts and paint the streets red on Blood Avenue or play in a close-quarter environment like Dracula's Castle.
description_short: Bloodbound is a Vampire, Vampire Slayer multiplayer first-person action shooter. Locations are varied and detailed, and each character comes with its own unique weapons and special abilities. Pick a side, squad up, and master a rising roster of fearless characters in this fast-paced bloody FPS.
